import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # Pocket - blue pyramid transforms to green ball when picked up
    # So holding_blue_pyramid is always 0; holding_green_ball is the key state
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # One-hot for pocket
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3) - target to pick up
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_blue_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_blue_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_blue_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5) - place target
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_yel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_yel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_yel_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Is front tile adjacent to yellow hex (distance == 1)?
    front_y_f = front_y.astype(jnp.float32)
    front_x_f = front_x.astype(jnp.float32)
    front_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(front_y_f - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(front_x_f - yel_hex_x)
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_placeable_next_to_hex = (front_is_floor * front_adj_hex)

    # Agent adjacency to yellow hex
    agent_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)
    agent_adj_hex = (agent_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Can place right now? (holding green ball AND front is floor adjacent to hex)
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_is_placeable_next_to_hex

    # Doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Closest closed door
    cd_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_closed, 1.0)
    cd_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_closed, 1.0)
    rel_cd_y = (cd_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_cd_x = (cd_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_cd = (jnp.abs(cd_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(cd_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Phase: 0 = need pickup, 1 = need place
    phase_need_pickup = (1.0 - holding_green_ball)
    phase_need_place = holding_green_ball

    # Full grid observation - normalized tile ids and colors
    # Shape: H*W*2 = 13*13*2 = 338
    full_grid_tiles = tile_ids.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0   # 169
    full_grid_colors = tile_colors.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0  # 169

    # Structured features
    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket one-hot (25)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,

        # Key flags (3)
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, can_place_now]),

        # Blue pyramid (6)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f-1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_blue_pyr_y, rel_blue_pyr_x,
                   dist_blue_pyr, blue_pyr_exists]),

        # Yellow hex (6)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f-1), yel_hex_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_yel_hex_y, rel_yel_hex_x,
                   dist_yel_hex, yel_hex_exists]),

        # Front tile (27)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor, front_adj_hex,
                   front_is_closed_door, front_is_placeable_next_to_hex]),

        # Adjacency & phase (4)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex, phase_need_pickup, phase_need_place,
                   agent_to_hex_dist / (H_f + W_f - 2)]),

        # Door info (5)
        jnp.array([n_closed / 4.0, n_locked / 4.0, n_open / 4.0,
                   rel_cd_y, rel_cd_x]),

        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
    ])
    # structured has: 6+25+3+6+6+27+4+5+1 = 83 elements

    # Total: 83 + 169 + 169 = 421 (under 512)
    obs = jnp.concatenate([structured, full_grid_tiles, full_grid_colors])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
